Development Watch

2 projects have location data.

Proposed

Northeast Neighborhood Trail Extension

📍 N Wallace Ave to Story Mill, Bozeman, MT

Developer: City of Bozeman Parks Department

Proposed multi-use trail connecting the Northeast Neighborhood to Story Mill Community Park.

trailsparkstransportation
Updated Mar 1, 2026
Under Review

North Rouse Mixed-Use Development

📍 845 N Rouse Ave, Bozeman, MT 59715

Developer: Peak Development Group

Proposed 4-story mixed-use building with ground-floor retail and 24 residential units.

mixed-useresidentialretail
Updated Feb 10, 2026 City Planning Docs →
Approved

Peach Street Apartment Complex

📍 623 E Peach St, Bozeman, MT 59715

Developer: Montana Housing Partners

Approved 18-unit apartment complex targeting workforce housing.

residentialaffordable-housing
Updated Jan 20, 2026
